message:
fix: prevent UTF-8 boundary panic in OpenAPI display string truncation

Replace all direct byte-slice truncation (&s[..n]) with a safe
truncate_str() helper that respects UTF-8 character boundaries.
Previously, multi-byte characters in endpoint paths, summaries, or
descriptions could cause a panic when truncated for table display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
